---
title: "Touchpad &quot;Scroll&quot; stopped working , Not the buttons"
date: 2013-03-11
forum: General Help
---

### Post by chaitanya2106 on 2013-03-11
Hello Everyone, 
After downloading & installing updates & upon rebooting, my laptop's (Dell Vostro 1400) touchpad scrolling function stopped working. Though the left & right buttons & double click function is working smoothly. 
Upon opening System Settings -> Mouse and Touchpad , there is no Touchpad tab.  Here's a screenshot:
[IMG]http://ubuntuforums.org/image/png;base64,[/IMG]


I installed Ubuntu 12.04 LTS today, the touchpad scrolling was working then. Didn't look up the Mouse and Touchpad window at that time since everything was working fine. But after installing some updates , the scrolling stopped. 

Regards,
Chaitanya
